Here is why this PR was created. I'm using `juliac.jl` to build an executable or shared library. Using `--trim` option is helpful to reduce the size of binary. One day, `julia +nightly juliac.jl --trim ...` did not work suddenly. I decided it check source code to resolve the issue. I found 

https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/522f496994d374afe4e38db31cbb6543cda144ef/src/jloptions.c#L989

is added at some point. As of yesterday, fixing the `static_call_graph_arg` was a easy solution to me. 

Today I found providing `--experimental` option to the below is another option...

https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/0bedaae82864ff2c6f2642ff7230d63a82b58792/contrib/juliac.jl#L13-L23

If one feel my PR is a duplicate of https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/56602 , feel free to close this issue.

```diff
-static_call_graph_arg() = isnothing(trim) ? `` : `--trim=$(trim)``
+static_call_graph_arg() = isnothing(trim) ? `` : `--experimental --trim=$(trim)``
```

Ref https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/56654/files

On the other hand, my feelings are the same as @JeffBezanson  says.

{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738","id":1442953084,"node_id":"I_kwDOBplwkM5WAbd8","number":738,"title":"macOS: System image file fails consistency check on binary startup","user":{"login":"ghyatzo","id":8601724,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjg2MDE3MjQ=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8601724?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo","html_url":"https://github.com/ghyatzo","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ghyatzo/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":43,"created_at":"2022-11-09T23:48:25Z","updated_at":"2023-12-15T03:43:24Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"<!--

Upon creating an app, the process goes on smoothly, untill it is time to actually call the binary.
I get the error: `ERROR: System image file failed consistency check: maybe opened the wrong version?`
```
Julia Version 1.8.2
Commit 36034abf260 (2022-09-29 15:21 UTC)
Platform Info:
  OS: macOS (arm64-apple-darwin21.3.0)
  CPU: 10 × Apple M1 Pro
  WORD_SIZE: 64
  LIBM: libopenlibm
  LLVM: libLLVM-13.0.1 (ORCJIT, apple-m1)
  Threads: 8 on 8 virtual cores
Environment:
  JULIA_NUM_THREADS = 8
  JULIA_DEPOT_PATH = /Users/cshen/.local/julia
```

I installed julia through `juliaup`. the juliaup folder is in `~/.local/juliaup` and the julia versions in `~/.local/julia/juliaup`.
the binaries in `~/.local/juliaup/bin` are symlinked to `~/.local/bin` which is in the `PATH`.
I also have julia aliased to `julia --project=@.`

Could it be that the symlinking throws some pathing off somewhere?","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738/reactions","total_count":3,"+1":1,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":2},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/comments/1857224760","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738#issuecomment-1857224760","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738","id":1857224760,"node_id":"IC_kwDOBplwkM5uswA4","user":{"login":"terasakisatoshi","id":16760547,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE2NzYwNTQ3","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/16760547?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi","html_url":"https://github.com/terasakisatoshi","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/terasakisatoshi/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2023-12-15T03:43:23Z","updated_at":"2023-12-15T03:43:23Z","author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","body":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738#issuecomment-1838901893 works on my Intel macOS :D

```julia
using PackageCompiler
using PackageCompiler: get_extra_linker_flags, julia_libdir, julia_private_libdir, ldlibs, bitflag, march, run_compiler
# https://github.com/JuliaLang/PackageCompiler.jl/issues/738#issuecomment-1838901893

# I know this causes type piracy, which is a bad solution, but it will save life for those who want to comple for macOS somehow
function PackageCompiler.create_sysimg_from_object_file(object_files::Vector{String},
                                        sysimage_path::String;
                                        version,
                                        compat_level::String,
                                        soname::Union{Nothing, String})

    if soname === nothing && (Sys.isunix() && !Sys.isapple())
        soname = basename(sysimage_path)
    end
    mkpath(dirname(sysimage_path))
    # Prevent compiler from stripping all symbols from the shared lib.
    o_file_flags = Sys.isapple() ? `-Wl,-all_load $object_files -Wl,-ld_classic` : `-Wl,--whole-archive $object_files -Wl,--no-whole-archive`
    extra = get_extra_linker_flags(version, compat_level, soname)
    cmd = `$(bitflag()) $(march()) -shared -L$(julia_libdir()) -L$(julia_private_libdir()) -o $sysimage_path $o_file_flags $(Base.shell_split(ldlibs())) $extra`
    run_compiler(cmd; cplusplus=true)
    return nothing
end

using MyExe

create_app(pkgdir(MyExe), "build", force=true)
```

See also [my gist](https://gist.github.com/terasakisatoshi/c1b03c8b2791340b33e6781038e1c451)
